description: 3-panel row (palette | canvas | inspector) fills available height with overflow-hidden
Inspector aside panel has overflow-y-auto and scrolls independently
Palette panel has overflow-y-auto and scrolls independently (no fixed-top floating hack)
Remove isPaletteFloating / fixed top-0 logic — replaced by CSS overflow scroll
Canvas stays visible while scrolling either side panel
Grid column layout picker: visual widget with 5 preset grid column options in Layout Controls panel
Grid column picker: clicking a preset sets layout.gridTemplateColumns to corresponding value
Grid column picker: clicking a preset from flex mode switches layout.display to 'grid' and applies the chosen columns
Grid column picker: active preset highlighted based on current gridTemplateColumns value
Grid column picker: shows when layoutMode === 'grid' inside renderContainerLayoutControls
Grid column picker: remains visible in flex mode so users can switch into grid without raw CSS editing
Layout controls render for section nodes as well as container nodes
Grid column picker: raw CSS input visible below for custom gridTemplateColumns values
Spacing stepper: gap field uses numeric stepper + unit selector instead of text input
Spacing stepper: padding field uses numeric stepper + unit selector
Spacing stepper: unit dropdown with px (default), %, rem options
Spacing stepper: parses existing CSS values on load (e.g. '16px' -> 16, px)
Spacing stepper: writes back as combined CSS string (e.g. '16px')
Margin: four individual stepper fields (top, right, bottom, left)
Margin: link-all toggle that syncs all four values when linked
Margin: parses existing CSS shorthand on load
Margin: writes back as CSS shorthand string
New preset: 'Notes + Totals Row' (2-col grid: wide notes left, narrow totals right)
New preset: 'Two Equal Columns' (2-col grid section)
New preset: 'Three Info Columns' (3-col grid for info cards)
New presets use CSS grid layout properties (not legacy flex mode)
New preset: 'Recurring + One-time Tables' adds two stacked dynamic tables pre-bound to recurringItems and onetimeItems
Quote binding: recurringItems collection filters line_items where is_recurring === true
Quote binding: onetimeItems collection filters line_items where is_recurring !== true
Quote binding: serviceItems collection filters line_items where service_item_kind === 'service'
Quote binding: productItems collection filters line_items where service_item_kind === 'product'
Quote value binding: recurringSubtotal, recurringTax, recurringTotal computed aggregates
Quote value binding: onetimeSubtotal, onetimeTax, onetimeTotal computed aggregates
Quote value binding: serviceSubtotal, serviceTax, serviceTotal computed aggregates
Quote value binding: productSubtotal, productTax, productTotal computed aggregates
QuoteViewModel type extended with filtered item arrays (recurring_items, onetime_items, etc.)
QuoteViewModel type extended with per-group aggregate fields
mapLoadedQuoteToViewModel computes filtered arrays from line_items
mapLoadedQuoteToViewModel computes per-group aggregates from filtered arrays
Table editor collection dropdown lists new filtered collection bindings
Fields palette tab shows new quote aggregate bindings for discovery
All new inspector controls work correctly in dark theme
Existing templates render identically after changes (no visual regression)
